name: @etricks/game-shell
description: The game-agnostic application framework every manufactured game runs inside (ADR-0027). Provides the full screen set (splash → home → map → activity → rewards → shop → settings …) and platform systems (progression, economy, cloud sync, theme, localization, analytics) as configurable, injectable pieces. A game = game-shell + activity-engine + theme + content + assets + branding.
